evals.prompt: Post the code review in .CodeReview/US-410849.md as a comment on PR 75324.
evals.expected_output: A new active PR thread on PR 75324 whose comment body is the greeting line `Hi @<GUID>, please help me check this code review result:` followed by `---` and the full report, mentioning the PR author. No file is attached.
expectations: Routes to PR mode (target is a PR, not a work item) and reads references/pr-publish.md
Uses scripts/pr_publish.py to compose and post — does not hand-build az rest calls
The comment body is the greeting + '---' + the FULL report inline (not summarized, no Must Fix shortlist extraction)
Runs ado_autolink_guard.py fix + check before composing the inline body so accidental #number refs are escaped
The mention token is `@<GUID>` using PR.createdBy resolved via az repos pr show (no identity-cache/Graph lookup)
Runs with --dry-run first to preview body + mention GUID before the real post
Persists state to .CodeReview/.{branch}.pr-publish.json with prId, threadId, commentId, iteration

evals.prompt: The dev pushed fixes — follow up the review on PR 75324 with the updated report.
evals.expected_output: A fresh PR thread with the new report is posted AND the prior thread is resolved (status closed); state file iteration is bumped and the resolved thread id is recorded.
expectations: Detects prior PR state (threadId present) and runs followup behaviour
Posts a NEW thread (does not edit the prior comment in place)
Resolves the prior thread via pr_publish.py publish --prior-thread <id> (PATCH status=closed)
Updates state: bumps iteration and appends the resolved thread id to priorThreadIds[]

non_goals: Does not change the PR vote, status, or auto-complete settings — only thread status
Does not summarize, truncate, or drop report sections in PR mode (full report inline)
Does not publish accidental raw #number refs; only explicit work-item contexts keep raw #number
Does not attach a file in PR mode (attachment is WI-mode only)
Does not mention multiple reviewers unless explicitly asked (default = PR.createdBy)
Does not modify the existing work-item publish flow
